mapper.insert: insert into book(name, description, author, category, publish, book_no, location_id, number) values( #{name}, #{description}, #{author}, #{category}, #{publish}, #{bookNo}, #{locationId}, #{number})
mapper.update: update book set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, author = #{author}, category = #{category}, publish = #{publish}, book_no = #{bookNo}, location_id = #{locationId}, number = #{number}, updatetime = #{updatetime} where id = #{id}
update book set number = number + 1 where book_no = #{bookNo}
mapper.select: select * from book order by id desc

select * from book
name like concat('%', #{ name },'%')
and book_no like concat('%', #{ bookNo },'%')
order by id desc
